_comment: Hooks shipped by the synapsis plugin. When the plugin is installed and trusted, these run in every Grok session (in any consumer project). They use GROK_WORKSPACE_ROOT / GROK_PLUGIN_ROOT so they target the correct launch directory and the installed plugin code. This is how the plugin can 'automatically do the init part'.

hooks.command: cd "${GROK_WORKSPACE_ROOT:-$cwd}" && uv --directory "${GROK_PLUGIN_ROOT}" run --frozen python -m tools.synapsis knowledge init 2>/dev/null || true
cd "${GROK_WORKSPACE_ROOT:-$cwd}" && uv --directory "${GROK_PLUGIN_ROOT}" run --frozen python -m tools.synapsis hygiene 2>/dev/null || true
cd "${GROK_WORKSPACE_ROOT:-$cwd}" && uv --directory "${GROK_PLUGIN_ROOT}" run --frozen python -m tools.synapsis hygiene 2>/dev/null || true
cd "${GROK_WORKSPACE_ROOT:-$cwd}" && uv --directory "${GROK_PLUGIN_ROOT}" run --frozen python -m tools.synapsis hygiene 2>/dev/null || true
